name: Adult Diapers
description:
Looking for donations of Adult Diapers (Size XL), preferably the pull-up/pants type, for an elderly lady whom we are supporting in the community.

She has mobility difficulties and relies on a walking stick to move around safely. She is also experiencing incontinence, and because she is quite frail, she is often unable to get to the toilet in time, especially when she is outside her home. Pull-up style diapers would help her feel more comfortable, maintain her dignity, and give her greater confidence to attend medical appointments and carry on with her daily activities.

If you have any Adult Diapers (Size XL, pull-up/pants type) to spare, your donation would make a meaningful difference in supporting her daily needs.

If you are able to help or would like more information, please feel free to reach out to Nisah at 9657 3159 via WhatsApp or phone call.

Thank you for your kindness and generosity in supporting our community.

name: Single-size Mattress
description:
The family comprises seven household members residing in a two-room flat. The husband is the sole breadwinner, while the client is medically unfit for employment due to multiple chronic health conditions. The client’s daughters are also unable to work due to their own health conditions and are the primary caregivers for the client, their elderly grandmother, and a primary-school-going nephew.

The family is seeking assistance with one single-bed mattress and one super single mattress. Their existing mattresses are badly worn, with the springs surfacing through the material. This has caused significant discomfort and contributed to the client’s back pain, affecting her ability to rest adequately. Given the family’s limited financial resources and ongoing caregiving and medical needs, they are unable to afford suitable replacements.

The requested bedding items would provide the family with a safer and more comfortable sleeping arrangement and support the client’s physical wellbeing and rest.

passiton.name: 1 King size mattress , 2 queen size mattresses, 1 single mattress, 1 dining chair and 2 lounge chair

name: Bed and Mattress
description: 69-year-old man who lives alone in a 1-room HDB public rental flat and faces significant health, financial and social challenges. He is single, never married, with no children and no siblings. He is currently unemployed, has no regular income and experiences multiple medical conditions, diabetes, hypertension and depression. He spends most of his time at home due to his declining health and sleeps on an old, thin, worn and torn mattress that is infested with bed bugs. Client is troubled by bedbug bites and is unable to sleep as a result. Donation of a new mattress will greatly support client in addressing concerns with bed bugs at home. Interested donors, please contact social worker Latricia at 83187180 or email at latriciatay@carecorner.org.sg. Thank you so much for your support.

name: Chest of Drawers
description:
An elderly man with multiple medical conditions lives with his brother in a one-room public rental flat. Due to his health, he is unable to work and facesd ongoing financialn constraints. His brother was recently released from prison and is currently unemployed, further limited the household's financial resources.

With limited storage space, the brother's clothing and personal belongings are currently kept on the floor, creating a cluttered living environment.

A doante chest of drawers would provide essential storage and help the brothers to organise their belongings, creating a more organised home environment for them.

name: Shoe Rack
description:
Donor Request: Shoe Rack
A family of four living in a rental 2-room flat in Yishun is in need of a new or used shoe rack.
The household comprises a husband (58), his wife (54), and their two adult sons (aged 22 and 20), who are currently serving National Service. As the family does not own a shoe rack, their footwear tends to pile up outside the flat entrance, creating a cluttered and disorganised space.
This is a particular concern for the wife, who is a stroke survivor and relies on a wheelchair and walker to get around. Clutter near the entrance poses a real safety risk for her when entering and leaving the home, and having a shoe rack would go a long way in keeping the area clear and safe.
The husband is the family's sole breadwinner, working as a private hire vehicle driver. As his income can be variable, and with his wife unable to work due to her condition, the family has limited means to purchase household items on their own.
A donated shoe rack, whether new or used, would make a meaningful difference in supporting a safer and more comfortable home environment for this family. Your generosity would be deeply appreciated.
Required dimensions: Height up to 1m, width up to 1.5m, depth up to 0.3m
specifications: Height up to 1m, width up to 1.5m, depth up to 0.3m

name: Wheelchair
description:
The client has a history of abdominal medical conditions and has recently been experiencing symptoms of vertigo. She reported frequent episodes of dizziness, particularly when walking in crowded environments or under prolonged exposure to heat. As a result, she often needs to stop after walking short distances to rest, regain her balance, and reorient herself.

Given her current functional limitations and the risk of falls or fainting during community mobility, the provision of a wheelchair would significantly enhance her safety and mobility by enabling her to travel longer distances without exacerbating her symptoms.
specifications: A wheelchair with a high weight capacity
